mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month PAYEMS growth raises expected household income and near-term revenue forecasts, so higher payroll momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 152544 thousand for 2020-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month PAYEMS growth does not produce higher average 20-day forward returns than lower growth in walk-forward tests, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals a recessionary labor shock that cuts earnings expectations and raises risk premia, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 3.5 percent for 2020-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below unconditional mean returns at p < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in INDPRO indicates falling factory output and weaker operating leverage, so a downside break in industrial production predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO contractions are followed by non-negative 60-day forward returns at a frequency above the sample base rate or if the return spread versus non-triggered periods is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: Rising HOUST reflects stronger interest-rate-sensitive durable demand and future construction activity, so higher housing-starts momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1567 thousand units for 2020-01-01
failure_condition: Reject if 6-month HOUST momentum has a non-positive coefficient in walk-forward return regressions and the top-minus-bottom quintile 60-day return spread is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth supports equity revenues only when inflation is not accelerating; positive RSAFS momentum with stable CPIAUCSL predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth above 0 and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation change below its 12-month median
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 529766 million dollars for 2020-01-01
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal does not outperform RSAFS momentum alone, or if triggered observations fail to deliver positive 20-day forward returns above the unconditional positive-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL raises expected policy restraint and compresses equity valuation multiples, so an upside inflation break predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses above its trailing 24-month median by at least 1 percentage point
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation accelerations are followed by positive 5-day forward returns in more than 65% of cases or if average triggered returns are not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising FEDFUNDS combined with accelerating CPIAUCSL signals restrictive policy against inflation, increasing discount rates and predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 6-month change above 0 and CPIAUCSL 6-month inflation above its trailing 24-month median
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 1.58 percent for 2020-02-01
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term between FEDFUNDS changes and CPIAUCSL inflation is not negative in walk-forward regressions or if triggered 60-day returns exceed unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: Decelerating GDPC1 growth signals broad real-demand weakness and lower aggregate profits, so a downside break in real GDP momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth crosses below its trailing 8-quarter median
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value was 19220.49 billion chained 2017 dollars for 2019-10-01
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 downside breaks are not followed by lower 60-day forward returns than non-break periods, or if the signal has negative-hit accuracy below 50% in recession-risk windows.
